design_implications: command surface must expose query/export operations, not raw JSON spelunking
export packet must bind artifacts by current SHA-256
operator commands must be reproducible and fail-closed
audit commands should map to existing query packs and evidence artifacts

sources.claim: OpenTelemetry logs are structured to enable correlation, filtering, querying, and analysis across telemetry signals.
SLSA provenance is useful only when consumers inspect/verify it.
SLSA provenance captures where, when, and how artifacts were produced.
SRE postmortem action items should prevent or mitigate recurrence.
